name: scholar
description: A young Korean scholar in white dopo (traditional scholar robe), topknot hairstyle with gat (traditional hat), carrying a book bundle, gentle and determined expression

name: officials
description: Joseon dynasty court officials in dark blue dallyeong (official robes) with winged gat hats, dignified bearing, stern expressions

name: crowd
description: Joseon dynasty townsfolk in simple hanbok, joyful expressions, clapping and cheering under colorful lanterns

name: village
description: Traditional Korean village with thatched-roof houses, stone walls, persimmon trees, mountain backdrop

name: journey
description: Winding path through Korean countryside at dawn, rice paddies, distant Hanyang city walls on the horizon

name: palace
description: Grand Joseon palace interior with wooden pillars, dancheong (colorful paintwork), stone courtyard, traditional tile roof

name: examination
description: Joseon gwageo (civil exam) hall with wooden desks, brush and ink, mulberry paper, scholars seated in rows

name: celebration
description: Joseon village square decorated with colorful lanterns, flower garlands, festive crowd, golden sunlight

name: korean historical drama
description: Korean historical drama style, Joseon dynasty, cinematic composition, warm color palette, detailed traditional costumes
